/usr/bin/clang -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/pwordcount.dir/pwordcount.c.o CMakeFiles/pwordcount.dir/pwc_utils.c.o CMakeFiles/pwordcount.dir/pwc_reader.c.o CMakeFiles/pwordcount.dir/pwc_counter.c.o CMakeFiles/pwordcount.dir/pwc_counterManager.c.o CMakeFiles/pwordcount.dir/pwc_logger.c.o CMakeFiles/pwordcount.dir/pwc_config.c.o -o pwordcount
